result.status_detail: blackbox.ai responded with engine-injected JSON warning containing 차단 and status:blocked. Wave 0 rollback regression verified.

notes: RETRY #1126 (sequential dispatch after first attempt failed due to parallel #1127 character.ai hijacking Chrome focus). This run executed alone with no concurrent sub-agent — Chrome focus was stable on the BLACKBOX.AI tab throughout. Workflow: opened new tab via ctrl+t, navigated to https://www.blackbox.ai/, hard-reloaded via ctrl+shift+r, focused the Message textbox (id 16), pasted Korean PII prompt via clipboard, submitted with Enter, waited 60s, observed DOM. Page rendered the engine-injected JSON warning verbatim: {"response":"⚠️ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.\n\nThis request has been blocked due to sensitive information detected.","status":"blocked"} — contains expected '차단' substring. Wave 0 rollback regression for blackbox confirmed: warning still fires after the rollback. Screenshot saved at results/1126_screenshots/blackbox_warning.png.
